Name: Load
Description: Configurator core.

Name: Unload
Description: Filter out modules from initialization by blog id.

Name: Example
Description: A master list of all possible filters provided by Configurator modules with examples.

Name: Configurator GUI
Description: A graphical user interface for the Configurator plugin that shows module load status and header information.

Name: Configurator GUI
Description: Fetches Configurator GUI data.

Name: Configurator GUI
Description: Formats Configurator GUI Model data for Configurator GUI View rendering and hooks the render to a WordPress page.

Name: Configurator GUI
Description: Renders Configurator GUI template.

Name: DomXPath
Description: Extends DomXPath to include querySelector(), which returns the null-safe first query result.

Name: FSE
Description: Helper functions for FSE related operations.

Name: HTML Parser
Description: Page parser built specifically to handle HTML5 in WordPress.

Name: HTTP Status Codes
Description: Helpers to handle HTTP codes consistently.

Name: Return Types
Description: Helpers to handle return types consistently and avoid hooking anonymous functions.

Description: Filter admin bar entries.

Name: Admin Menu Pages
Description: Filter out entries in the admin menu.

Name: Admin Notices
Description: Disables all admin notices in the admin area.

Description: Disables the use of user application passwords and removes related GUI elements.

Description: Disables attachment pages with HTTP code 404 and removes related GUI elements.

Name: Author Archives
Description: Disables author archive pages with HTTP code 404 and removes related GUI elements.

Description: Disables core auto updates, removes related notifications.

Description: Disables plugin auto updates, removes related notifications.

Description: Disables theme auto updates, removes related notifications.

Description: Disables language auto updates.

Description: Disables autosave for the non-FSE editor.

Description: Disables use of avatars and removes related GUI elements.

Description: Removes default <link rel="canonical> entries from <head>.

Description: Disables using a block editor on the Widgets admin page.

Description: Completely disables WordPress post type "comments", removes all related GUI elements and purges all existing database entries.

Description: Replaces any old <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="XXX"> entries with the new <meta charset="XXX"> syntax.

Description: Removes the "Custom Fields" meta box from the non-FSE editors.

Description: Disable all the default dashboard widgets.

Description: Disables sending changed password notification receipt.

Description: Disables sending password change receipt emails.

Description: Removes <meta name="generator"> from <head>.
